display.purpose: Article title (h1). The single large, bold element on a page.

headline.purpose: Structural section labels (近期文章, 联系). Bold but small.

title.purpose: Post title inside a list. Regular weight, one size up from body, coral on hover.

body.purpose: Prose. 1.9 line-height for Chinese readability, capped at a 42rem column.

label.purpose: Quiet kickers like the table-of-contents marker (目录). Bold, tracked, low-contrast.

shadows.name: overlay-float
shadows.purpose: The single resting shadow, used only on the floating search overlay panel. Surfaces are otherwise flat.

motion.name: state-transition
motion.purpose: Default for color/background hover and focus transitions (duration-300 ease-in-out).

motion.name: reveal-on-load
motion.value: transform + opacity, 300ms ease-out, staggered 100ms per element
motion.purpose: The .animate entrance: elements rise from -0.75rem and fade in, staggered down the page.

components.name: Borderless Post Entry
components.description: Signature list entry: muted date, regular-weight serif title, optional cover image, clamped two-line excerpt. No box, no border.
components.html:
2025年7月20日

启蒙思想家与日本近代化笔记

明治启蒙思想家如何推动日本近代化的读书笔记。
components.css: .ds-post-entry { display: block; max-width: 42rem; text-decoration: none; font-family: ui-serif, Georgia, Cambria, 'Noto Serif SC', 'Songti SC', serif; } .ds-post-date { display: block; font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(38% 0.004 90 / 0.5); } .ds-post-title { margin: 0.25rem 0 0; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.4; color: oklch(38% 0.004 90); transition: color 300ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-post-entry:hover .ds-post-title, .ds-post-entry:focus-visible .ds-post-title { color: oklch(49% 0.155 33); } .ds-post-excerpt { margin: 0.75rem 0 0; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.6; color: oklch(38% 0.004 90 / 0.6); display: -webkit-box; -webkit-line-clamp: 2; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; overflow: hidden; }

components.name: Tag Chip
components.description: The one bordered inline element. Transparent fill, hairline Ink border, tonal hover tint.
components.css: .ds-tag { display: inline-block; font-family: ui-serif, Georgia, Cambria, 'Noto Serif SC', 'Songti SC', serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(38% 0.004 90); border: 1px solid oklch(38% 0.004 90 / 0.15); border-radius: 0.25rem; padding: 4px 8px; text-decoration: none; transition: background 300ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), color 300ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-tag:hover, .ds-tag:focus-visible { background: oklch(38% 0.004 90 / 0.05); }

components.name: Icon Button
components.description: The only button type: square icon control (theme toggle, back-to-top). Transparent fill, hairline border, icon pulse on hover.
components.html: <button class="ds-icon-btn" aria-label="Light theme"><svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="5"></circle><line x1="12" y1="1" x2="12" y2="3"></line><line x1="12" y1="21" x2="12" y2="23"></line><line x1="4.22" y1="4.22" x2="5.64" y2="5.64"></line><line x1="18.36" y1="18.36" x2="19.78" y2="19.78"></line><line x1="1" y1="12" x2="3" y2="12"></line><line x1="21" y1="12" x2="23" y2="12"></line></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-icon-btn { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 36px; height: 36px; border: 1px solid oklch(38% 0.004 90 / 0.15); border-radius: 0.25rem; background: transparent; color: oklch(38% 0.004 90); cursor: pointer; transition: background 300ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-icon-btn:hover, .ds-icon-btn:focus-visible { background: oklch(38% 0.004 90 / 0.05); }

components.name: Inline Link
components.description: In-prose link: subtle Ink underline that warms to Terracotta Coral on hover.
components.css: .ds-link { font-family: ui-serif, Georgia, Cambria, 'Noto Serif SC', 'Songti SC', serif; color: oklch(38% 0.004 90); text-decoration: underline; text-underline-offset: 3px; text-decoration-color: oklch(38% 0.004 90 / 0.3); transition: color 300ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), text-decoration-color 300ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-link:hover, .ds-link:focus-visible { color: oklch(49% 0.155 33); text-decoration-color: oklch(49% 0.155 33); }

components.name: Kicker Label
components.description: Quiet bold-tracked marker, e.g. the table-of-contents heading 目录.
components.css: .ds-kicker { margin: 0; font-family: ui-serif, Georgia, Cambria, 'Noto Serif SC', 'Songti SC', serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.1em; color: oklch(38% 0.004 90 / 0.45); }

narrative.northStar: 温暖的读物间 (The Warm Reading Room)
narrative.overview: 喫茶去 is a quiet, warm room made of paper and ink. The name is Zhaozhou's three-character koan, 'go drink tea,' and the surface behaves like a tea-bright study for notes on Buddhism, Japanese history, and music. Warm cream paper holds soft charcoal type, a single terracotta accent appears only where a hand would point, and the rhythm is generous and unhurried. The room is deliberately under-decorated because it will grow: a future photography section will hang on these same walls, so the system commits to restraint that can host imagery without redecorating. It rejects the mass-produced AI SaaS landing page and the dark neon tech surface by name.
keyCharacteristics: Warm paper ground, soft charcoal ink, one terracotta accent. Calm by construction.
Serif throughout, tuned for Chinese reading, with an airy 1.9 line-height.
Flat. Depth comes from hairline borders and tonal tints, not shadows.
Borderless, typographic lists. No card grids.
Built to welcome photography later without changing its bones.

rules.name: The One Chroma Rule
rules.body: Terracotta Coral is the only saturated color on any screen, reserved for interaction and emphasis. No second color, no filled accent panel.

rules.name: The Tinted Neutral Rule
rules.body: Pure #000 and #fff are forbidden. Every neutral is warm-tinted toward the paper hue; borders and tints are opacity-stepped Ink.

rules.name: The Two-Weight Rule
rules.body: The serif ships only at 400 and 700. For Chinese, font-medium renders 400 and font-semibold renders 700, so weight is binary. Build hierarchy from size and color, not imaginary mid-weights.

rules.name: The Masthead-Anchor Rule
rules.body: The bold brand 喫茶去 in the header is the heaviest text in the chrome. List titles sit one size up but stay regular weight so they never out-shout it.

rules.name: The Flat-Paper Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. A shadow means a surface is genuinely floating (an overlay), not a card on the page. Decorative shadows and glass panels are forbidden.

dos: Do keep Terracotta Coral (oklch(49% 0.155 33)) as the only saturated color, used only for hover and emphasis.
Do tint every neutral toward the warm paper hue; borders and hover states are opacity-stepped Ink (/5, /10, /15, /20).
Do set body text at 1.9 line-height and cap prose at a 42rem reading column for Chinese readability.
Do build hierarchy from size and color, because the serif only renders at 400 and 700.
Do list posts as borderless typographic entries with generous whitespace: date, title, excerpt.
Do ship real photographs when the image section arrives. One decisive picture beats a colored placeholder block.
Do keep surfaces flat; reserve shadow and blur for genuinely floating overlays (the search panel).
donts: Don't let it read as a mass-produced AI SaaS landing page: no centered hero, no feature-card grid, no gradient accents.
Don't turn it into a dark neon tech surface: no glowing accents, no glass panels as decoration, no cold slate or true-black ground.
Don't use #000 or #fff. Untinted neutrals are forbidden.
Don't wrap posts in bordered or rounded card boxes, and never build an identical card grid.
Don't fake a mid-weight on Chinese type; font-semibold renders the same 700 as bold and will out-shout the masthead at large sizes.
Don't use side-stripe borders, gradient text, or decorative glassmorphism.
Don't add a second accent color or fill a surface with the coral. The One Chroma Rule holds.
